title: GACL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendant and More Posts
shortInfo: The latest Gujarat Alkalies and Chemicals (GACL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendant, Senior Chemist, Assistant Officer, Senior Officer, Chief Manager, Additional General Manager and other posts! Published on 20-05-2026 at the official website, gacl.com, this new recruitment drive offers multiple openings for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 53 years of age and possessing qualifications such as Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, or M.Sc can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 31-05-2026. Find all details about the GACL Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendan

basic_details.job_title: GACL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendant, Senior Chemist, Assistant Officer, Senior Officer, Chief Manager, Additional General Manager etc.
basic_details.short_information: The latest Gujarat Alkalies and Chemicals (GACL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendant, Senior Chemist, Assistant Officer, Senior Officer, Chief Manager, Additional General Manager and other posts! Published on 20-05-2026 at the official website, gacl.com, this new recruitment drive offers multiple openings for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 53 years of age and possessing qualifications such as Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, or M.Sc can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 31-05-2026. Find all details about the GACL Executive Trainee, Boiler Attendan

qualification.details: 1. Executive Trainee (Mechanical) | Qualification: B.E / B.Tech (Mechanical) from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks. Passing Year: 2023 to 2026 only. Mandatory: Valid GATE 2023/2024/2025/2026 score (mention marks out of 100). Preference: Gujarat domicile & relevant experience. | 2. Executive Trainee (Chemical) | Qualification: B.E / B.Tech (Chemical) with minimum 60% marks. Passing Year: 2023 to 2026 only. Mandatory: Valid GATE score (2023-2026). Preference: Gujarat domicile. | 3. Boiler Attendant | Qualification: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering + First Class Boiler Attendant Certificate. Experience: Minimum 5 years operational experience of 20 MT/Hr steam generation boiler with SCADA / PLC. Job Role: Routine boiler operations, emergency handling, IBR inspections etc. | 4. Senior Chemist (QC) | Qualification: M.Sc (Chemistry) full time from recognized university. Experience: Minimum 6 years in Quality Control / Assurance in Chemical Industry (Preference: Caustic Chlorine). Skills: Instrumental analysis, ISO & NABL documentation. | 5. Assistant Officer (Security) | Qualification: Any Graduate. Experience: NCO / JCO of Defence Forces with min. 12 years experience OR 5 years in force + 3+ years industrial security experience. Eligibility: Paramilitary forces (BSF, CRPF, CISF etc.) also eligible. Must be in Shape-1 medical category. | 6. Senior Officer / Officer (Corporate Communications) | Qualification: Any Post Graduate (Preference: Mass Media / Communication). Experience: Minimum 5 years in Corporate Communications / PR. Skills: Press releases, Social Media (Canva), Event Management, Branding, Stakeholder Coordination. | 7. Chief Manager / Senior Manager (Electrical) - Projects | Qualification: B.E / B.Tech (Electrical) full time. Experience: Minimum 15 years in Electrical Project Planning, Execution, Design, Procurement & Commissioning. | 8. Additional General Manager (Finance) | Qualification: CA / CMA. Experience: Minimum 23 years. Age Limit: Not above 53 years. Key Areas: Financial Strategy, Accounts, Audit, Treasury & Fund Management.

how_to_apply: Register / Login with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Upload required documents (Photo, Signature, Educational Certificates, Experience letters, GATE Scorecard etc.).
Note: Candidates must mention accurate GATE marks (out of 100) and year. Do not upload percentile.
important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted. Candidates should possess all required qualifications and experience as on the closing date. Preference will be given to candidates having Gujarat domicile. Relevant post-qualification experience in Chemical / Chlor-Alkali / Petrochemical industries is highly desirable. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. The company reserves the right to cancel / modify the recruitment process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GACL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for GACL Recruitment 2026 is 31 May 2026. The application window opened on 20 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply before the deadline to avoid last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How to apply online for GACL Executive Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: To apply for GACL Executive Trainee (Mechanical/Chemical) posts, visit the official recruitment portal at https://gaclportal.gacl.co.in/hrportal/login.jsp. Register with your email and mobile number, fill the form, upload documents including GATE scorecard, and submit before 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Is GATE score mandatory for GACL Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid GATE score (2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026) is mandatory for Executive Trainee positions in Mechanical and Chemical branches. Candidates must mention their actual GATE marks out of 100 (not percentile) during application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for GACL Executive Trainee (Mechanical/Chemical)?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed B.E/B.Tech in the respective branch from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks and should have graduated between 2023 to 2026. GATE qualification is compulsory.

faq.question: Q5. What is the experience required for Boiler Attendant post in GACL 2026?
faq.answer: For the Boiler Attendant position, candidates need a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering + First Class Boiler Attendant Certificate with a minimum of 5 years operational experience in 20 MT/Hr steam generation boilers with SCADA/PLC systems.

faq.question: Q6. Who can apply for Assistant Officer (Security) in GACL Recruitment?
faq.answer: Ex-Defence personnel (NCO/JCO) with minimum 12 years of service or 5 years in force + 3+ years industrial security experience are eligible. Paramilitary forces (BSF, CRPF, CISF, ITBP, SSB) candidates are also eligible. The candidate must be in Shape-1 medical category.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Additional General Manager (Finance) in GACL?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Additional General Manager (Finance) is 53 years. Candidates must have CA/CMA qualification with minimum 23 years of relevant finance experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is Gujarat domicile required for GACL jobs 2026?
faq.answer: Gujarat domicile is not mandatory but candidates with Gujarat domicile will be given preference in selection for most positions.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to apply for GACL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to upload: Recent photograph, signature, educational certificates, GATE scorecard (for ET posts), experience letters, First Class Boiler Certificate (if applicable), caste/domicile certificate (if claiming preference), and other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q10. When will the GACL Recruitment 2026 selection process start?
faq.answer: The selection process (merit list based on GATE score for Trainee posts and interview/experience for other positions) is expected to begin after the application window closes on 31 May 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be informed through the official portal or email.
